name: intercomm-aimfp
description: InterComm AIMFP — local-only multi-instance coordination for Claude Code (master/worker via tmux + git worktrees), the multi-agent parallelization addon for AIMFP.

plugins.name: intercomm-aimfp
plugins.description: MCP server (19 tools) + slash commands, a setup skill, and hooks for master/worker coordination, worktree isolation, no-poll escalation, and semantic-changeset merge. Requires the AIMFP MCP server.
